table_focus.reason: Operation identity anchors all OP40 extraction results.
Part name defines the product object for process knowledge.
Calibration force is a key process parameter constrained by kN unit rules.
Quality remarks provide approval and burr-limit constraints.
Press equipment supports equipment-parameter relation extraction.
Die tooling supports tooling-operation relation extraction.

drawing_focus.reason: Process sketch provides geometry context for flanging and calibration regions.
Stamping mark region supports quality traceability extraction.
Quick locating map supports locating-support evidence alignment.

symbol_focus.reason: SC symbol indicates special quality-control evidence.
Arrow links quality mark label and physical position.
Quick locating cross anchors locating evidence.
Feed direction arrow provides process orientation.

candidate_constraints.description: Die setting height and production height must use mm as the unit.
Calibration force must use kN as the unit and must be checked after first-article approval.
Side piercing clearance is adjusted according to sheet thickness and burr quality.
SC, stamping mark, calibration mark, and quick locating symbols must be linked to image or symbol evidence.
OP40 extraction must preserve operation identity, station address, equipment, tooling, parameters, and sketch annotations in the same document partition.
